nature: smoke-harness conformance only, completed before any live prompt; no prompts, semantic words, layers, positions, cadence, top-k, or thresholds changed

corrections.restoration_gate: two-phase execution: the smoke phase can emit at best technical_gates_passed_pending_restore (source-asserted in tests that 'passed' cannot appear in its body); only the finalize phase — after external serving restore, the frozen public-safe verification request, and a model-list check — writes gate 8 as boolean true and outcome passed; any restore or verification failure writes the blocked outcome
corrections.cleanup: try/finally issues bridge-disable, telemetry-disable, bridge-uninstall, telemetry-uninstall in order, verifies each RPC result on every rank, tolerates and records exceptions while continuing the remaining steps, and releases the engine before external restore; any failure blocks
corrections.dispatch_identity: all rank summaries fetched; zero id-mismatch and zero missed-dispatch required on every rank with expected rank count and unique identities; only aggregate maxima/sums published
corrections.envelope: the complete frozen parity envelope (margin_prompts 2, first_divergence_floor 8) is field-checked and hashed from the pinned M36V artifact; both A-vs-B and B-vs-C legs enforce baseline+margin on differing prompts and the frozen floor (not the baseline minimum) on first divergence
corrections.authoritative_conformance: at least one authoritative global readout per prompt; multiple authoritative ranks must agree exactly; non-authoritative ranks must emit no ids or scores; projection-call and captured-slot counts must match across ranks (bridge fetch now reports per-rank captured_slots/decode_steps counters)

tests: tests/test_m37jc_smoke.py — 17 synthetic tests covering all nine steer-required cases; 30 pass with the bridge suite
